title: Cutlery Set, BEWOS 16 Piece Stainless Steel Flatware Set, Tableware Silverware Set with Spoon Knife and Fork Set, Service for 4, Dishwasher Safe/Easy Clean, Mirror Polished
features: 【Service for 4 people】BEWOS 16PCS cutlery set include 4 dinner knives, 4 dinner spoons, 4 dinner forks and 4 teaspoons, which makes a great choice for every family.
【Health and Durable】The silverware set is made of quality food grade stainless steel which ensure health and durability, non toxic, nickel free, corrosion resistant and dishwasher safe.
【Superior Design】Classy looking with concise design handle, smooth surface and mirror polished make these utensils always remain glossy, which will make your table settings elegant and different.

【Exquisite Craft and Good Grip】This high-quality stainless steel tableware has a sturdy construction, no need to worry about bending, not too heavy and flimsy. The flatware set with no rough spots that ensures the safety of your lips, appropriate thickness and weight is suitable for both adults and children. Delicately design can provide you with a good grip.

【Multi-purpose】These cutlery sets are perfect for family daily use, also suitable for restaurant, hotel, festivals, wedding, travelling, camping, party, catering, etc. If you have problems with our cutlery, please don’t hesitate to contact us so that we can satisfy your satisfaction.
